title: Vouacapoua cubensis
taxonomy: Vouacapoua cubensis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the pea or legume family. This plant is native to tropical regions and belongs to the genus Vouacapoua. Vouacapoua cubensis is further classified into the subfamily Faboideae, one of the largest subfamilies within the Fabaceae family. The plant is a type of tree, characterized by its broad leaves and clusters of small, yellow flowers. It is a relatively rare species and is found in specific regions of Central and South America.
